blocked_reasons: Existing bucket policy preservation evidence is missing for CloudFront + OAC migration.
An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the AssumeRole operation: Access denied. Check role ARN and trust policy.
decision_rationale: Family resolver preserved explicit S3.2 profile 's3_migrate_cloudfront_oac_private_manual_preservation' but downgraded it to non-executable guidance. Existing bucket policy preservation evidence is missing for CloudFront + OAC migration. An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the AssumeRole operation: Access denied. Check role ARN and trust policy. Run creation did not require additional risk-only acceptance.

title: S3 general purpose buckets should block public access
